rulings.Case Title: ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC DBA SLOANE, A CALIFORNIA VS. 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Complainants Cross-Defendants Kenneth Paige, And Peter Paiges Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike 1042 Minna Homeowners Association, Matt Small, Catherine Norris, Peter Conley, Lisa Perkins Amended Cross-Complaint Filed Without Leave Of Court Or A Court Order; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 1. Cross-Defendants Kenneth Paige, And Peter Paige's Motion To Strike 1042 Minna Homeowners Association, Matt Small, Catherine Norris, Peter Conley, Lisa Perkins Amended Cross-Complaint Filed Without Leave Of Court Or A Court Order; Request For Sanctions. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to strike Amended Cross-Complaint filed without leave of Court is GRANTED. Cross-Complainants shall file a proper motion for leave to amend in compliance with all provisions of CRC 3.1324. Request for sanctions under CCP 128.5 is denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BERRY JOE CORPORATION VS. RAYMOND S CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Consistent With The Arbitration Award Of David G. Finkelstein
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF BERRY JOE CORPORATION'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Consistent With The Arbitration Award Of David G. Finkelstein. GRANTED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACKSON HOU VS. BENHAM ZANDINEJAD et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANT BEHNAM (SUED AS BENHAM) ZANDINEJAD'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b) as to March 4, 2008 judgment. Plaintiff and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP VS. DANIIL BRODOVICH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANTS DANIIL BRODOVICH, ANASTASIA VESTFAL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Hearing Required to address evidence re: promise to dismiss the action. Competent non-hearsay evidence is required. Defendant's Declaration paragraph 5 is not sufficient. Motion is denied to the extent it is based on CCP 473(d) and CCP 473(a); relief based on extrinsic fraud and mistake to be addressed at the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. TRACY THOMPSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Leave To Amend, With Cost Estimate, Leave To Amend And Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT TRACEY THOMPSON'S Motion To Leave To Amend, With Cost Estimate, Leave To Amend And Appeal. OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSIE NGUYEN ET AL VS. GUADALUPE HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2018, Line 6. PLAINTIFFS ROSIE NGUYEN, HUNG VU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing Required. =(501/REQ)
